properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.redis.hnsw.ef-construction
properties.description: EF_CONSTRUCTION parameter for HNSW algorithm. Size of the dynamic candidate list during index building. Higher values lead to better recall but slower indexing. Typically between 50-500.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.redis.hnsw.ef-runtime
properties.description: EF_RUNTIME parameter for HNSW algorithm. Size of the dynamic candidate list during search. Higher values lead to more accurate but slower searches. Typically between 20-200.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.redis.hnsw.m
properties.description: M parameter for HNSW algorithm. Represents the maximum number of connections per node in the graph. Higher values increase recall but also memory usage. Typically between 5-100.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.redis.index-name
properties.description: The name of the Redis search index.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.redis.prefix
properties.description: The key prefix for Redis documents.
